description: Design and build state-of-the-art web applications. Work on core product architecture, design APIs, and implement responsive user experiences.
Create modern, aesthetic user journeys, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups. Champion glassmorphic and elegant visual styles for our customers.
Connect advanced LLM APIs, set up vector databases, build custom agentic pipelines, and optimize runtime performance for AI-assisted tools.
Lead user acquisition strategy, manage social platforms, drive SEO campaigns, perform analytics tracking, and scale our brand reach globally.
